meaning: adj.鑳芥帹鐞嗙殑,鑳芥帹璁虹殑
examples: The inferable theorem is discussed under the mixed circumstances under fuzzy functional dependency and fuzzy multivalued dependency.
This article explores specially the use of inferable anaphoric NPs, esp. definite NPs, in discourse based on some foreigners' pragmatic and cognitive studies.
And this was easily inferable at the time.
